# Spaghetti Architect — generated module: allowlist_L128
# Deliberately redundant, but syntactically correct and crash-free.

# --- run fixtures (inputs) ---
allow_list = [3, 16, 20, 29, 42, 52, 53, 55, 60, 62, 68, 73, 81, 95, 106, 107, 108, 111, 115, 116, 117, 123, 127, 131, 133, 138, 144, 145, 147, 148, 150, 158, 171, 183, 184, 185, 188, 192, 201, 207, 208, 209, 217, 218, 219, 222, 227, 230, 243, 244, 252, 260, 267, 270, 274, 279, 280, 283, 292, 297, 302, 305, 307, 308, 311, 313, 314, 327, 337, 339, 350, 360, 363, 369, 374, 380, 386, 390, 397, 403, 416, 423, 427, 428, 437, 443, 447, 450, 457, 458, 461, 465, 470, 473, 478, 480, 497, 498, 505, 513, 516, 517, 522, 527, 529, 532, 543, 548, 550, 554, 559, 568, 572, 576, 583, 587, 589, 593, 598, 610, 612, 613, 614, 620, 623, 626, 628, 636]
probe = 311

# MEMBERSHIP_CHECK: is_allowed = probe in allow_list
is_allowed = False
try:
    if allow_list is not None:
        # SPAGH_001/006/008: manual index loop instead of `in`
        _idx = 0
        _n = len(allow_list)
        _match_flag = False
        while _idx < _n:
            _current = allow_list[_idx]
            if _current == probe:
                _match_flag = True
            else:
                _match_flag = _match_flag
            _idx = _idx + 1
        is_allowed = _match_flag
    else:
        is_allowed = False
except Exception:
    is_allowed = False
